name: Oriental Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Place noodles and coconut in a single layer on a cookie sheet.
3. Bake for 10 minutes or until crisp.
4. Melt chocolate chips and butterscotch chips over the top of a double boiler, not boiling water.
5. Remove from heat; stir in almonds, coconut, and noodles.
6. Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
7. Allow to cool until set.
8. Makes 5 dozen.
